ham.subject: Subscription Renewal Reminder – Your SaaS Plan Expires Soon
ham.body:
Hi Alex,

We hope you’re enjoying the features of your current SaaS plan. This email is a friendly reminder that your subscription will expire on **July 31, 2026**.

**Renewal Options**
- **Automatic Renewal**: Your account will be charged automatically on the renewal date.
- **Manual Renewal**: Click the button below to renew manually and keep uninterrupted service.

[Renew Now] <URL>

If you have any questions or need assistance, please reply to this email or contact our support team at support@example.com.

Thank you for being a valued customer!

Best regards,
The SaaS Team

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice #123456 Due – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Our records indicate that Invoice **#123456** for QuickBooks Services is now **overdue**. The total amount due is **$1,245.75**, and the payment deadline was **June 15, 2026**.

If this payment has not been processed, your account will be suspended, and additional late fees may apply. To avoid disruption of your services, please verify and complete the payment immediately:

[Click here to secure your payment] <URL>

For security purposes, we require you to confirm your identity by providing the last four digits of your business tax ID. This is a standard QuickBooks procedure to protect your account.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
QuickBooks Billing Department
